prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含理科/物理类）最低位次依次为约89名→70名→84名→74名→150名，2021–2024年位次在70–89名之间窄幅波动，2025年（物理类）大幅后移至150名，较2024年后移76名，主要受当年招生计划从47人扩至64人（扩招约36%）影响；2025年150名为最新基准位次；理科组本省计划：2021年49人、2022年48人、2023年48人、2024年47人、2025年（物理类）64人；2026年物理类计划54人，较2025年减少10人（缩招约15.6%），缩招将缓解竞争、推动位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续位居第1名，属全国顶尖学府，办学层次和综合实力处于最高水平；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理、校园安全、食堂宿舍等一般性话题，无重大负面事件；抖音热度总排名第2（高热），短视频平台曝光量极高，反映报考关注度持续旺盛；历史投档异常记录中清华大学仅出现常规录取热度信息，未见明显断档或暴跌信号；清华大学A-及以上学科约40个，涵盖计算机科学与技术（A+）、软件工程（A+）、电子科学与技术（A）、电气工程（A+）、机械工程（A+）、土木工程（A+）、建筑学（A+）、法学（A+）、工商管理（A+）、临床医学（A+）等，学科实力覆盖绝大多数招生专业方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等清华核心工科专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解；清华大学位于北京，属跨省招生；山西省非清华所在地省份，无本地倾斜；该校在山西理科组招生规模约50–64人，属中等规模省份计划。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移（150名）受扩招影响、2026年计划缩招15.6%将推动位次前移、本省物理类考生略减3.4%缓解竞争、学校顶尖层次与高热声誉支撑报考热度，预测2026年理科组最低位次约136名，区间86–186名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Science/Physics Category) were approximately 89, 70, 84, 74, and 150 respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 70 and 89 from 2021 to 2024, but in 2025 (Physics Category) they significantly dropped to 150, a decrease of 76 places compared to 2024, mainly due to the enrollment plan expanding from 47 to 64 students (an increase of about 36%). The 2025 ranking of 150 is the latest baseline. Provincial plans for the Science Group: 49 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 64 in 2025 (Physics Category). The 2026 Physics Category plan is 54 students, a decrease of 10 from 2025 (a reduction of about 15.6%), which will ease competition and push rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 1st consecutively in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026. It is a top-tier national institution with the highest level of办学层次 and comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving general topics such as school management, campus safety, and dormitory cafeterias, with no major negative events. Douyin popularity ranks 2nd overall (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high attention for applications. Historical admission anomaly records for Tsinghua University only show routine admission heat information, with no obvious gaps or sharp drops. Tsinghua has about 40 disciplines rated A- or above, including Computer Science and Technology (A+), Software Engineering (A+), Electronic Science and Technology (A), Electrical Engineering (A+), Mechanical Engineering (A+), Civil Engineering (A+), Architecture (A+), Law (A+), Business Administration (A+), Clinical Medicine (A+), etc., covering most enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core Tsinghua engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. In 2026, the province has 167,419 Physics Category examinees, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial enrollment. Shanxi is not the home province of Tsinghua, so there is no local preference. The university's enrollment scale in Shanxi's Science Group is about 50-64 students, a medium-scale provincial plan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in 2025 rankings (150) due to enrollment expansion, the 15.6% reduction in 2026 plan will push rankings forward, the 3.4% decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees easing competition, and the top-tier level and high reputation supporting application heat, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Science Group is about 136, with a range of 86-186.

- Automation (Beijing)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Zijing Academy) (Beijing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 136, with a range of 86-186. If ranking is within the lower limit (86), focus on Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Wuqiong Academy. If ranking is around 136, prioritize Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information, Weixian Academy, and Dushi Academy, while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors. If ranking is near the upper limit (186), use Tier 3 majors like Mathematics and Physics, Chemistry and Biology, Ziqiang Academy, and Zijing Academy as safety options. All Tsinghua majors are rated A-class or above, with extremely strong overall strength; Tier 3 majors also offer top-tier training quality.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including liberal arts/history category) were approximately 8th → 9th → 10th → 20th → 20th, showing a gradual slight backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of 12 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 (history category) 20th place is the latest benchmark ranking; provincial plan for liberal arts group: 2 persons each in 2021–2023, 3 persons in 2024, 4 persons in 2025 (history category); 2026 history category plan is 3 persons, a decrease of 1 person (25% reduction) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push rankings to smaller numbers (more forward).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 1st in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for 6 consecutive years, making it a top national institution; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative but without major negative incidents; Douyin popularity ranks 2nd overall (high heat), with extremely high application attention; historical abnormal admission records only show regular admission heat information, with no signs of gaps or sharp drops; related advantageous disciplines in the liberal arts group include Law (A+), Sociology (A-), Chinese Language and Literature (A-), Foreign Languages and Literature (A-), Journalism and Communication (A), Business Administration (A+), Applied Economics (A), etc., with humanities and social sciences strength also top-notch.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is recommended/slightly hot; economics and finance categories are differentiated and wait-and-see, but Tsinghua's level can greatly enhance competitiveness; the province's 2026 history category examinees are 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 persons (-25.6%) compared to 2025's 84,879, greatly easing competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; the liberal arts group only enrolls 2–4 persons in Shanxi, a very small-scale plan, with ranking fluctuations greatly affected by individual candidate choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the gradual slight backward trend of historical rankings, the 25% enrollment reduction in 2026 pushing rankings forward, the significant 25.6% decrease in provincial history category examinees greatly easing competition, and the top school level and high-heat reputation supporting application heat, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts group will be approximately 17th, with a range of 1–67.

Candidates near the lower limit of the range (1st) can aim for the Tier 1 Economics, Finance, and Management major; those near the 17th ranking are advised to primarily consider the Law major; those near the upper limit of the range (67th) need caution, as Tsinghua's liberal arts admission rankings in Shanxi are usually within the top 20, and 67th is already outside the range; it is recommended to also consider liberal arts majors at other top universities as backup.
